title: RG10 9XY, Grundon Waste Management Limited: environmental permit issued – EPR/YP3237SD/V004
body: "The Environment Agency publish permits that they issue under the Industrial Emissions Directive (IED).  This decision includes the permit and decision document for:    Operator name: Grundon Waste Management Limited   Installation name: Star Works Treatment Plant   Permit number: EPR/YP3237SD/V004   "
